title: San Ramon Earthquake: Magnitude 3.4 Earthquake Rattles San Ramon Area Late Sunday Night

title: Cave-inspired 3D printed Japanese home touted as earthquake resistant — two-story house first of its kind to be granted seismic compliance certificate
description: Construction of the first government approved two-story 3D printed home has been completed in Japan. The design is 'cave-inspired.'
content: Construction of the first government-approved two-story 3D printed home has been completed in Japan. Understandably, the land of the rising sun has stringent seismic compliance regulations, so this i… [+2836 chars]

Der Bau des ersten von der Regierung genehmigten zweistöckigen 3D-gedruckten Hauses wurde in Japan abgeschlossen. Das Design ist „Höhlen-inspiriert“.

title: How a band of engineers anticipated the cloud and remade the internet
description: Distributed systems of servers now power almost everything we do online, from file sharing to video streaming to shopping. PlanetLab at Princeton helped set things in motion.
content: On December 26, 2004, an earthquake in the Indian Ocean triggered a global tsunami that left catastrophic damage in 17 countries and killed hundreds of thousands of people. As the water retreated, te… [+9976 chars]

Verteilte Serversysteme unterstützen mittlerweile fast alles, was wir online tun, von der Dateifreigabe über Video-Streaming bis hin zum Einkaufen. PlanetLab in Princeton hat dazu beigetragen, die Dinge in Gang zu bringen.
en: How a band of engineers anticipated the cloud and remade the internet. Distributed systems of servers now power almost everything we do online, from file sharing to video streaming to shopping. PlanetLab at Princeton helped set things in motion.
